data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of suspending grants without uninstalling the extension. However, the evidence provided does not include any details or mechanisms that demonstrate this capability. The linked use case mentions the need for this feature but lacks concrete evidence of its implementation, indicating a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of the ability to suspend grants without uninstalling the extension.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence of grant suspension capability
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Provide concrete evidence of the ability to suspend grants without uninstalling the extension.
